figures.caption: Figure 2: Panache end to end on an ECG5000 motif pair (𝑖 = 3925, 𝑗 = 7564,𝑚 = 20). All values are computed from the data, and the left spine is the stream itself. (A) Each sample updates the retained coefficients in 𝑂 (𝐾): drop 𝑡𝑖 , add 𝑡𝑖+𝑚 , one fixed rotation (worked example in each lane); a completed window is normalized to 𝐹 and hashed into a 12-bit directory address (§3.1–3.4). (B) 𝐹 𝑗 ≈ 𝐹𝑖 : same prefix, same bucket. (C) The Parseval bound rejects 214 of 215 candidates (Lemma 2); the one exact evaluation (d = 0.165) is emitted and its neighborhood refined (§3.6).
